headline: Southern Company (SO) Price Target Raised by TD Cowen on Financing and Demand Outlook
summary: The Southern Company (NYSE:SO) is included among the 14 Stocks on the Verge of Becoming Dividend Aristocrats. On March 6, Shelby Tucker of TD Cowen raised the firm’s price objective on The Southern Company (NYSE:SO) to $112 from $108. It maintained a Buy rating on the shares. The firm said the company’s loan guarantee from […]

headline: Elon Musk's xAI wins permit to build power plant in Mississippi despite pollution concerns
summary: Mississippi regulators authorized xAI to build a power plant with 41 natural gas-burning turbines in Southaven to power its nearby data centers.

headline: Utilities Trade Focus On Quarterly Results For Long-Term Outlooks
summary: As data center development fuels an unprecedented wave of large-load customer contracts, US electric utilities are emphasizing long-term spending and growth visibility. Read more here.
